Package neqsim.process.chemistry.util

Class ChemistryUncertaintyAnalyzer

java.lang.Object
neqsim.process.chemistry.util.ChemistryUncertaintyAnalyzer
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable
public class ChemistryUncertaintyAnalyzer extends Object implements Serializable
Monte Carlo + tornado uncertainty analyser tailored to chemistry-package models.

Use it to sample MIC, scavenger stoichiometry, kinetic-order, base-corrosion-rate, etc., and report the P10/P50/P90 of an arbitrary scalar output, plus a tornado-style sensitivity ranking. The user provides:

  1. an ordered list of UncertainParameter entries (name, distribution sampler, low/base/ high for tornado);
  2. a model function f(double[] sample) -&gt; double which receives the sampled values in the same order they were registered and returns the scalar of interest;
  3. the number of Monte Carlo trials (default 1000).

The class is deliberately framework-light (no NeqSim MonteCarloSimulator coupling) so it can wrap any evaluate()/get*() pair from this package without change.

Version:
1.0
Author:
ESOL
